market_pulse: Mid-week momentum building: OMNIA and Tao Beach consolidating star-studded weekends while LIV counteracts with official bookings (Matroda, Precise); Zouk's tech narrative gaining ground, Palm Tree capturing daylife premium segment.

content_gaps.description: Tao Beach and Hakkasan heavily leveraging EDC Week storytelling and early-June promotion; LIV has limited visibility in this segment despite prime positioning.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Create 3-5 countdown stories and Reels for LIV's EDC Week lineup; tag @insomniac and cross-promote with emerging artists.

content_gaps.description: Competitors posting behind-the-scenes DJ booth access and artist meet-and-greets; LIV's creator content focuses on attendees rather than exclusive talent moments.
